$comment: Hand-vendored minimal permissive schema for REUSE.toml. No public upstream / SchemaStore entry exists for the REUSE.toml format, so this schema is intentionally NOT in packages/shared/utils/sync/src/schemas.ts SCHEMA_SOURCES and is excluded from sync:check. It exists so editor `#:schema` resolves and `check-jsonschema --check-metaschema` passes.
title: REUSE.toml Configuration
description: Configuration file for the REUSE tool (REUSE.toml). Permissive: validates the top-level shape without constraining every field.

path.description: A path or glob (or array thereof) the annotation applies to.
